arts.ttl: Scott McTominay 'exactly' what Man Utd need as Gary Lineker hands Amorim's system blunt reality check
arts.sum: The Napoli maestro and ex teammate Marcus Rashford were placed in the same boat when it came to their upturn in fortunes

Monza patiently await their destiny of relegation after conceding a 1-0 defeat to Venezia last week. On the other hand, Napoli will look to build on their 3-0 win over Empoli earlier this week, with ...
